page_title: The Final Decision We All Must Take
text:
"The Final Decision We All Must Take" is a song from the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance. It is track 15 in the album Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/19800 

In the film, the song is featured when Evangelion Unit-02 enters Beast Mode to confront the Tenth Angel. 

Lyrics

 
In the end the final decision we all must take, make or break,
will decide what will be and our destiny.
If we lose the fight armageddon will finally tell,
burn in hell, there will be no after, be no other day.
